tasks.label: [COINBASE_CRYPTO][W] 🟢 Start Engine — Crypto scan | Regime-aware | 24/7 market
tasks.command: echo '' && echo '═══════════════════════════════════════════════════' && echo '  ⚠️  THIS TASK WILL:' && echo '  Start the RBOTZILLA COINBASE CRYPTO engine.' && echo '  Crypto-native: 24/7 market | Regime detection | MTF Sniper Gate' && echo '  Price-proportional pip sizing | No forex session limits' && echo '  Then: live tail of engine log (Ctrl+C to stop watching)' && echo '═══════════════════════════════════════════════════' && echo '' && read -p '  Proceed? (Y/N/Exit): ' choice && case "$choice" in [yY]) bash scripts/start.sh && tail -f logs/engine_continuous.out ;; [eE]|[eE][xX][iI][tT]) echo '  Exited.' ;; *) echo '  Cancelled.' ;; esac

tasks.label: [COINBASE_CRYPTO][W] 🔴 Stop Engine — Kills the running Coinbase engine
tasks.command: echo '' && echo '═══════════════════════════════════════════════════' && echo '  ⚠️  THIS TASK WILL:' && echo '  Kill the running COINBASE CRYPTO engine process.' && echo '  Open positions remain on Coinbase with broker-side OCO.' && echo '═══════════════════════════════════════════════════' && echo '' && read -p '  Proceed? (Y/N/Exit): ' choice && case "$choice" in [yY]) bash scripts/stop.sh ;; [eE]|[eE][xX][iI][tT]) echo '  Exited.' ;; *) echo '  Cancelled.' ;; esac

tasks.label: [COINBASE_CRYPTO][RO] 📜 LIVE TAIL — Narration Events (narration.jsonl)
tasks.command: tail -f /home/rfing/RBOTZILLA_COINBASE_CLEAN/logs/narration.jsonl | python3 -c "import sys,json; [print(json.dumps(json.loads(l), indent=None)) for l in sys.stdin]" 2>/dev/null || tail -f /home/rfing/RBOTZILLA_COINBASE_CLEAN/logs/narration.jsonl

tasks.label: [COINBASE_CRYPTO][RO] 👀 Watch Live — Opens engine + narration panels
[COINBASE_CRYPTO][W] 🔒 Lock All Code — Sets .py/.sh to read-only (chmod 444)
tasks.command: echo '' && echo '═══════════════════════════════════════════════════' && echo '  ⚠️  THIS TASK WILL set ALL .py/.sh to read-only (444).' && echo '  Running engine is NOT affected.' && echo '═══════════════════════════════════════════════════' && echo '' && read -p '  Proceed? (Y/N/Exit): ' choice && case "$choice" in [yY]) find /home/rfing/RBOTZILLA_COINBASE_CLEAN -name '*.py' ! -path '*/logs/*' ! -path '*/.venv/*' -exec chmod 444 {} \; && find /home/rfing/RBOTZILLA_COINBASE_CLEAN -name '*.sh' ! -path '*/logs/*' ! -path '*/.venv/*' -exec chmod 444 {} \; && echo '✅ Locked (444)' ;; [eE]|[eE][xX][iI][tT]) echo '  Exited.' ;; *) echo '  Cancelled.' ;; esac

tasks.label: [COINBASE_CRYPTO][W] 🔓 Unlock All Code — Sets .py/.sh to writable (chmod 644/755)
tasks.command: echo '' && echo '═══════════════════════════════════════════════════' && echo '  ⚠️  THIS TASK WILL set .py to 644 and .sh to 755.' && echo '  Enables agent code editing and patching.' && echo '═══════════════════════════════════════════════════' && echo '' && read -p '  Proceed? (Y/N/Exit): ' choice && case "$choice" in [yY]) find /home/rfing/RBOTZILLA_COINBASE_CLEAN -name '*.py' ! -path '*/logs/*' ! -path '*/.venv/*' -exec chmod 644 {} \; && find /home/rfing/RBOTZILLA_COINBASE_CLEAN -name '*.sh' ! -path '*/logs/*' ! -path '*/.venv/*' -exec chmod 755 {} \; && echo '✅ Unlocked (644/755)' ;; [eE]|[eE][xX][iI][tT]) echo '  Exited.' ;; *) echo '  Cancelled.' ;; esac

tasks.label: [COINBASE_CRYPTO][W] 🔍 Reassess Trades — Runs TradeManager cycle (can modify SL)
tasks.command: echo '' && echo '═══════════════════════════════════════════════════' && echo '  ⚠️  THIS TASK WILL run a full TradeManager cycle.' && echo '  CAN modify stop-loss on open crypto trades.' && echo '═══════════════════════════════════════════════════' && echo '' && read -p '  Proceed? (Y/N/Exit): ' choice && case "$choice" in [yY]) .venv/bin/python scripts/reassess_trades.py ;; [eE]|[eE][xX][iI][tT]) echo '  Exited.' ;; *) echo '  Cancelled.' ;; esac

tasks.label: [COINBASE_CRYPTO][W] 📸 Snapshot + Backup — Coinbase engine backup
tasks.command: echo '' && echo '═══════════════════════════════════════════════════' && echo '  ⚠️  THIS TASK WILL:' && echo '  1. Create a dated SNAPSHOT folder in-repo' && echo '  2. Copy snapshot to ~/Desktop/' && echo '  3. Copy snapshot to ~/  (home root)' && echo '  Safe — does NOT restart the engine or modify .env.' && echo '═══════════════════════════════════════════════════' && echo '' && read -p '  Proceed? (Y/N/Exit): ' choice && case "$choice" in [yY]) SNAP="SNAPSHOT_COINBASE_$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M)" && mkdir -p "$SNAP" && cp -r engine strategies brokers foundation util scripts .vscode .env "$SNAP/" 2>/dev/null && echo "✅ In-repo snapshot: $SNAP" && cp -r "$SNAP" ~/Desktop/ && echo "✅ Desktop backup: ~/Desktop/$SNAP" && cp -r "$SNAP" ~/ && echo "✅ Home root backup: ~/$SNAP" ;; [eE]|[eE][xX][iI][tT]) echo '  Exited.' ;; *) echo '  Cancelled.' ;; esac
